code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digits = false
  mut sign = 1

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if has_digits
        product = product * (sign * current)
        current = 0
        has_digits = false
        sign = 1
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
    else if b == 43
      sign = 1
    else
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digits = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if has_digits
    product = product * (sign * current)
  end

  println("product=#{product}")
end
